dungeon: GENUINE ROTF-server run of THE SHATTERS — the BASE-GAME RotMG dungeon (a small facecam appears only at the very end; chat is readable for most of it). Long session (~556s+) through the Shatters: its three mini-bosses + the final Forgotten King, all with their CANONICAL RotMG taunts. KEY CORRECTION (provenance): 'Twilight Archmage' is a BASE-GAME Shatters boss — NOT a new custom boss. An earlier spec (disc_dkyXVJtdX_Q) flagged 'Twilight Archmage' as a 'NEW ROTF-custom boss candidate'; THIS tag proves it is base-game Shatters and should NOT be built as custom.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-frames+minimaps: the SHATTERS layout — dark stone CORRIDORS + lava channels linking the boss rooms. (1) the TWILIGHT ARCHMAGE room: a GREEN/YELLOW CHECKERED grid arena with red borders (the canonical Twilight room). (2) a brown/black LAVA biome with lava channels (the Forgotten King approach / 'nice dip in the LAVA' room). (3) a PURPLE/MAGENTA zone + dark corridors. (4) WHITE treasure-vault rooms (chest grids) traversed earlier in the session. The Shatters is the classic three-path-then-king layout.

bosses.name: Twilight Archmage
phases: alternates two elemental attacks: INFERNO (fire) and BLIZZARD (ice) — 'You leave me no choice... Inferno! Blizzard!'
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (canonical Shatters): INFERNO = ORANGE/RED fire bullets in a sweeping WAVE/ARC; BLIZZARD = BLUE ice/snowflake bullets in RADIAL RINGS / spirals. Alternating fire-wave + ice-ring beats in the green-grid arena. (Base-game pattern; documented as observed.)
taunts: Your souls will feel my evil
Your souls will feed my eyes
Ahh... this should do the trick
You leave me no choice... Inferno! Blizzard!
You will find that it was... so... to wake me
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (red boss-coloured 'Twilight Archmage'). BASE-GAME Shatters mini-boss -> these are CANONICAL RotMG Shatters taunts, NOT ROTF-custom. CORRECTS the disc_dkyXVJtdX_Q spec which mislabeled Twilight Archmage as a NEW custom candidate. Do NOT build as a new boss; if anything, these confirm base content. Some lines right-edge cut.

bosses.name: The Forgotten King
attacks: canonical Shatters Forgotten King patterns (lava/sword); not isolated here -> base-game
taunts: You would challenge me? I am the King of this place.
You are so brave. Perhaps a nice dip in the LAVA!?
Drown, and be swept away by those who have failed before.
YOU TEST THE PATIENCE OF A GOD!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange boss-coloured). BASE-GAME Shatters final boss -> CANONICAL taunts, not ROTF-custom. Recorded for completeness/reference only.

bosses.name: The Forgotten Sentinel
taunts: I tried to protect you... I have failed. You release a great evil upon this realm...
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat. BASE-GAME Shatters mini-boss -> CANONICAL taunts, not ROTF-custom.

drops: (Shatters loot; specific items not cleanly isolated)

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: a base-game THE SHATTERS run on the ROTF server. PRIMARY VALUE = a PROVENANCE CORRECTION: Twilight Archmage (+ The Forgotten King + The Forgotten Sentinel) are BASE-GAME Shatters bosses with CANONICAL taunts — NOT ROTF-custom. This CORRECTS the earlier disc_dkyXVJtdX_Q spec that listed 'Twilight Archmage' as a NEW custom boss candidate (it is not). Twilight Archmage's Inferno(fire-wave)/Blizzard(ice-ring) attack is DOCUMENTED-from-frames and matches the canonical Shatters pattern. The Shatters dungeon (green-grid Twilight room, lava Forgotten King arena, dark corridors) is present on this server. No new custom content; the value is preventing base-game Shatters bosses from being mistaken for ROTF-original.
uncertain: Identity as base-game Shatters is CERTAIN (canonical boss names + taunts + arenas all match RotMG's Shatters). Some Twilight Archmage lines right-edge cut. Whether the white treasure-vault rooms are a separate custom dungeon or part of the session's other content is unclear (traversed but not the focus). Exact Shatters loot not isolated.
confidence: HIGH that this is a BASE-GAME Shatters run (canonical Forgotten King / Twilight Archmage / Forgotten Sentinel taunts + arenas) and therefore LOW new-content value. The IMPORTANT output is the PROVENANCE CORRECTION (Twilight Archmage = base-game Shatters, not a new custom boss -> overturns the disc_dkyXVJtdX_Q misclassification + should stop any auto-bridge 'build Twilight Archmage' task). Attacks documented but base-game. Recommend: re-tag the disc_dkyXVJtdX_Q Twilight Archmage entry as base-game, and verify the auto-bridge hasn't queued/built it as custom.
